latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC1: 연결 끊김 시 2초 후 자동 재연결 시도
latestValidationChecks.evidence: STATE_CLOSED handler calls _schedule_retry(); first delay = 2.0 * pow(2.0, 0) = 2.0s

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC2: 재연결 성공 시 게임 화면 유지, 상태는 서버 다음 메시지로 복구
latestValidationChecks.evidence: On STATE_OPEN after reconnect, _retry_count reset to 0 and connected_to_server emitted; no screen transition triggered
delay = RETRY_BASE_SEC * pow(2.0, _retry_count) with _retry_count 0..4 yields 2, 4, 8, 16, 32 seconds

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC4: 5회 실패 시 reconnect_failed 시그널 → 에러 팝업
latestValidationChecks.evidence: _schedule_retry() emits reconnect_failed when _retry_count >= MAX_RETRY (5); Main.gd shows AcceptDialog

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC5: 의도적 disconnect는 재연결 트리거 안 함
latestValidationChecks.evidence: disconnect_from_server() sets _intentional_close = true; STATE_CLOSED handler returns early, skipping _schedule_retry()

validationChecks.criterion: AC1 — 연결 끊김 시 2초 후 자동 재연결 시도
validationChecks.evidence: STATE_CLOSED handler calls _schedule_retry(); first call computes delay = 2.0 * pow(2.0, 0) = 2.0s and starts _reconnect_timer

validationChecks.criterion: AC2 — 재연결 성공 시 게임 화면 유지, 상태는 서버 다음 메시지로 복구
validationChecks.evidence: On STATE_OPEN after reconnect, _retry_count is reset to 0 and connected_to_server is emitted; no screen transition triggered — existing server message handlers restore state

validationChecks.criterion: AC3 — 재연결 실패 시 지수 백오프 적용 (2→4→8→16→32초)
validationChecks.evidence: delay = RETRY_BASE_SEC * pow(2.0, _retry_count) with _retry_count 0..4 yields 2, 4, 8, 16, 32 seconds

validationChecks.criterion: AC4 — 5회 실패 시 reconnect_failed 시그널 → 에러 팝업
validationChecks.evidence: _schedule_retry() emits reconnect_failed when _retry_count >= MAX_RETRY (5); Main.gd _on_ws_reconnect_failed() creates and shows AcceptDialog

validationChecks.criterion: AC5 — 의도적 disconnect는 재연결 트리거 안 함
validationChecks.evidence: disconnect_from_server() sets _intentional_close = true before close(); STATE_CLOSED handler returns early when flag is true, skipping _schedule_retry()

validationChecks.criterion: Edge case — 재연결 타이머 중복 생성 방지
validationChecks.evidence: _schedule_retry() checks _reconnect_timer.is_stopped() before setting wait_time and starting
